greetings.text: Gheed's the name. Pleasure's mine. I deal in hard-to-find items and mercenaries. Got coin? I got goods.

services.response: Heh! Feeling lucky, are we? I'll sell you unidentified gear — could be junk, could be a treasure. Your gold, your risk.
Looking for an extra sword arm? Or bow? I know some Rogues from the monastery who'd fight for gold. Pick one.
Keys, scrolls, potions, the occasional trinket. What are ya buyin'?
